question: How many geohashes exist within a certain bounding box in EPSG:4326 coordinate reference system?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(?geohash) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?geohash a mds:Geohash .
  ?geohash mds:hasGeospatialBoundingBox ?bbox .
  ?bbox mds:hasMinimumLatitude ?minLat .
  ?bbox mds:hasMaximumLatitude ?maxLat .
  ?bbox mds:hasMinimumLongitude ?minLon .
  ?bbox mds:hasMaximumLongitude ?maxLon .
  ?geohash mds:usesSpatialReferenceSystem ?srs .
  FILTER(?minLat >= ?queryMinLat && ?maxLat <= ?queryMaxLat && ?minLon >= ?queryMinLon && ?maxLon <= ?queryMaxLon)
}

question: What satellite is the ASTER sensor mounted on?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?satellite ?satelliteName WHERE {
  ?sensor a mds:Sensor .
  ?sensor mds:hasSensorCommonName "ASTER" .
  ?sensor mds:mountedOn ?satellite .
  ?satellite mds:hasSatelliteCommonName ?satelliteName .
}

question: How many bands does the ASTER sensor collect?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT (COUNT(?band) AS ?bandCount) WHERE {
  ?sensor a mds:Sensor .
  ?sensor mds:hasSensorCommonName "ASTER" .
  ?sensor mds:containsBand ?band .
}

question: What of the available geospatial data has a spatial resolution of 250 meters or lower (i.e., finer)?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX qudt: <http://qudt.org/schema/qudt/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?raster ?resolution WHERE {
  ?raster a mds:GeospatialRaster .
  ?raster mds:hasSpatialResolution ?sr .
  ?sr qudt:numericValue ?resolution .
  FILTER(?resolution <= 250)
}

question: What geospatial raster data contains information about elevation?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?raster WHERE {
  ?raster a mds:GeospatialRaster .
  ?raster mds:containsGeospatialProperty ?prop .
  ?prop a mds:Elevation .
}

question: What geospatial raster data was acquired in 2016?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?raster ?date WHERE {
  ?raster a mds:GeospatialRaster .
  ?raster mds:acquiredOn ?acqDate .
  ?acqDate rdfs:label ?date .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?date), "2016"))
}

question: What geospatial raster data exists in the geohash "dpn"?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?raster WHERE {
  ?raster a mds:GeospatialRaster .
  ?raster mds:occupiesSpatialRegion ?geohash .
  ?geohash a mds:Geohash .
  ?geohash rdfs:label "dpn" .
}

question: What geohashes border the geohash "bccc"?
What bands contain near infrared information from the ASTER sensor?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?band ?bandName WHERE {
  ?sensor a mds:Sensor .
  ?sensor mds:hasSensorCommonName "ASTER" .
  ?sensor mds:containsBand ?band .
  ?band mds:hasBandCategory ?category .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?category), "near infrared"))
  ?band mds:hasBandCommonName ?bandName .
}

question: What satellites were launched in 2020?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?satellite ?name WHERE {
  ?satellite a mds:Satellite .
  ?satellite mds:hasSatelliteCommonName ?name .
  ?satellite mds:launchedOn ?launchDate .
  ?launchDate rdfs:label ?dateStr .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?dateStr), "2020"))
}

question: What geospatial data exists in the EPSG:5070 coordinate reference system?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?raster WHERE {
  ?raster a mds:GeospatialRaster .
  ?raster mds:usesSpatialReferenceSystem ?srs .
  ?srs a mds:SpatialReferenceSystem .
  ?srs rdfs:label "EPSG:5070" .
}

question: What geospatial data exists in the neighborhood of geohash "dpnq"?
What satellites are still operational?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?satellite ?name WHERE {
  ?satellite a mds:Satellite .
  ?satellite mds:hasSatelliteCommonName ?name .
  ?satellite mds:hasOperationalStatus ?status .
  ?status rdfs:label "Operational" .
}

question: What satellites and sensors are owned by NASA?
What geotiff files are available from 2020 to 2022?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?raster ?date WHERE {
  ?raster a mds:GeospatialRaster .
  ?raster mds:hasFileFormat ?fmt .
  ?fmt rdfs:label "GeoTIFF" .
  ?raster mds:acquiredOn ?acqDate .
  ?acqDate rdfs:label ?date .
  FILTER(?date >= "2020-01-01" && ?date <= "2022-12-31")
}

question: What raster datasets are available from the Terra satellite?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?raster WHERE {
  ?raster a mds:GeospatialRaster .
  ?raster mds:generatedBySatellite ?satellite .
  ?satellite a mds:Satellite .
  ?satellite mds:hasSatelliteCommonName "Terra" .
}

question: What band categories are available for the ASTER sensor?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?category WHERE {
  ?sensor a mds:Sensor .
  ?sensor mds:hasSensorCommonName "ASTER" .
  ?sensor mds:containsBand ?band .
  ?band mds:hasBandCategory ?category .
}

question: What raster data is available every 30 minutes in the geohash "bcff"?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?raster WHERE {
  ?raster a mds:GeospatialRaster .
  ?raster mds:hasTemporalResolution ?tempRes .
  ?tempRes rdfs:label "30 minutes" .
  ?raster mds:occupiesSpatialRegion ?geohash .
  ?geohash a mds:Geohash .
  ?geohash rdfs:label "bcff" .
}

question: What is the finest spatial resolution available from Terra datasets?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX qudt: <http://qudt.org/schema/qudt/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT (MIN(?resValue) AS ?finestResolution) WHERE {
  ?raster a mds:GeospatialRaster .
  ?raster mds:generatedBySatellite ?satellite .
  ?satellite mds:hasSatelliteCommonName "Terra" .
  ?raster mds:hasSpatialResolution ?sr .
  ?sr qudt:numericValue ?resValue .
}

question: What is the finest temporal resolution available from Terra datasets?
sparql_query:
PREFIX mds: <https://cwrusdle.bitbucket.io/mds/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?temporalRes WHERE {
  ?raster a mds:GeospatialRaster .
  ?raster mds:generatedBySatellite ?satellite .
  ?satellite mds:hasSatelliteCommonName "Terra" .
  ?raster mds:hasTemporalResolution ?tempRes .
  ?tempRes rdfs:label ?temporalRes .
}
ORDER BY ?temporalRes
LIMIT 1
